---
title: "R Packages"
lang: en
---

This page gathers the R packages I develop and maintain, with particular attention to packages available on CRAN and documented openly.

The CRAN information below was verified on June 24, 2026 from the official CRAN `DESCRIPTION` files.

## Packages on CRAN

::: { .grid .gap-4 }
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6}
::: {.package-card}
<div class="package-card-header">
<img src="../assets/packages/tutorizeR-logo.png" class="package-card-logo" alt="tutorizeR hex logo">
<h3>tutorizeR</h3>
</div>

Conversion of `.Rmd` or `.qmd` teaching material into interactive tutorials for `learnr` or `quarto-live`, with conversion reports, teacher tags, and question banks.

CRAN version: 0.4.5, published on June 11, 2026.

::: {.link-list}
[Dedicated page](packages/tutorizeR.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/tutorizeR/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[GitHub](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/tutorizeR){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[Vignette](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/tutorizeR/vignettes/getting-started.html){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6}
::: {.package-card}
<div class="package-card-header">
<img src="../assets/packages/donutmap-logo.svg" class="package-card-logo" alt="DonutMap hex logo">
<h3>DonutMap</h3>
</div>

Donut maps with `sf`, `ggplot2`, and `leaflet`. The package places donut charts on static or interactive maps and can add origin-destination flows.

CRAN version: 0.1.0, published on June 8, 2026.

::: {.link-list}
[Dedicated page](packages/donutmap.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/DonutMap/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[GitHub](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/DonutMap){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[Documentation](https://aureliennicosiaulaval.github.io/DonutMap/){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6}
::: {.package-card}
<div class="package-card-header">
<img src="../assets/packages/ggcircular-logo.svg" class="package-card-logo" alt="ggcircular hex logo">
<h3>ggcircular</h3>
</div>

A `ggplot2` extension for circular, axial, and directional data: rose diagrams, circular densities, mean directions, confidence arcs, and movement visualizations.

CRAN version: 0.1.0, published on June 4, 2026.

::: {.link-list}
[Dedicated page](packages/ggcircular.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/ggcircular/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[GitHub](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/ggcircular){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[Documentation](https://aureliennicosiaulaval.github.io/ggcircular/){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6}
::: {.package-card}
<div class="package-card-header">
<img src="../assets/packages/circularregression-logo.svg" class="package-card-logo" alt="CircularRegression hex logo">
<h3>CircularRegression</h3>
</div>

Regression models for circular responses: homogeneous angular regression, consensus angular regression, a two-step workflow, and a random-intercept extension for clustered circular responses.

CRAN version: 0.5.1, published on June 10, 2026.

::: {.link-list}
[Dedicated page](packages/circularregression.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=CircularRegression){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[GitHub](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/CircularRegression){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[Vignette](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/CircularRegression/vignettes/angular-regression-workflow.html){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6}
::: {.package-card}
<div class="package-card-header">
<span class="package-card-fallback">GO</span>
<h3>GeneralOaxaca</h3>
</div>

Blinder-Oaxaca decomposition for generalized linear models, with bootstrap standard errors and twofold or threefold decomposition outputs.

CRAN version: 1.0, published on August 17, 2015.

::: {.link-list}
[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/GeneralOaxaca/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::
:::
:::

## Related GitHub projects

The cards below highlight public R packages and compendia hosted on my GitHub account but not listed in the CRAN section above.

::: { .grid .gap-4 }
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6}
::: {.package-card .github-package-card}
<div class="package-card-header">
<span class="package-card-fallback">GL</span>
<div>
<h3>GLBFP</h3>
<div class="package-card-meta">R package • v0.5.1</div>
</div>
</div>

<span class="package-card-tag">Density estimation</span>

ASH, LBFP, and GLBFP estimators for nonparametric density estimation, with grid workflows, sparse computation, leave-one-out scores, and plotting tools.

::: {.link-list}
[GitHub](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/GLBFP){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[Documentation](https://aureliennicosiaulaval.github.io/GLBFP/){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6}
::: {.package-card .github-package-card}
<div class="package-card-header">
<span class="package-card-fallback">LT</span>
<div>
<h3>learnrTrackR</h3>
<div class="package-card-meta">R package • v0.3.0</div>
</div>
</div>

<span class="package-card-tag">Interactive teaching</span>

Tracking for `learnr`-style tutorial attempts, with SQLite or PostgreSQL storage, score summaries, Moodle exports, and pedagogical reports.

::: {.link-list}
[GitHub](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/learnrTrackR){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[Documentation](https://aureliennicosiaulaval.github.io/learnrTrackR/){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6}
::: {.package-card .github-package-card}
<div class="package-card-header">
<span class="package-card-fallback">GM</span>
<div>
<h3>gmov</h3>
<div class="package-card-meta">R package • v0.0.0.9000</div>
</div>
</div>

<span class="package-card-tag">Animal movement</span>

Trajectory-level generative validation diagnostics for SSF and iSSF models, comparing observed and simulated trajectories.

::: {.link-list}
[GitHub](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/gmov){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[Documentation](https://aureliennicosiaulaval.github.io/gmov/){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6}
::: {.package-card .github-package-card}
<div class="package-card-header">
<span class="package-card-fallback">CR</span>
<div>
<h3>contextR</h3>
<div class="package-card-meta">R package • v0.2.0</div>
</div>
</div>

<span class="package-card-tag">Statistical interpretation</span>

An S3 API for extracting structured statistical results, building prompts, and generating contextual explanations with validation checks.

::: {.link-list}
[GitHub](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/contextR){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6}
::: {.package-card .github-package-card}
<div class="package-card-header">
<span class="package-card-fallback">UL</span>
<div>
<h3>UlavalSSD</h3>
<div class="package-card-meta">R package • v0.2.0</div>
</div>
</div>

<span class="package-card-tag">Teaching datasets</span>

Datasets and helper functions for introductory data science teaching at Université Laval.

::: {.link-list}
[GitHub](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/UlavalSSD){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6}
::: {.package-card .github-package-card}
<div class="package-card-header">
<span class="package-card-fallback">HR</span>
<div>
<h3>HMMSSFGenerativeRepair</h3>
<div class="package-card-meta">R package • v0.1.0</div>
</div>
</div>

<span class="package-card-tag">HMM-SSF</span>

A development prototype for simulation, compatibility, sharpness, and interpretation diagnostics for HMM-SSF and HMM-iSSA models.

::: {.link-list}
[GitHub](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/HMMSSFGenerativeRepair){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[Documentation](https://aureliennicosiaulaval.github.io/HMMSSFGenerativeRepair/){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6}
::: {.package-card .github-package-card}
<div class="package-card-header">
<span class="package-card-fallback">EH</span>
<div>
<h3>evalue-HMM</h3>
<div class="package-card-meta">R package • v0.1.0</div>
</div>
</div>

<span class="package-card-tag">Predictive diagnostics</span>

Predictive e-diagnostics for hidden Markov models applied to animal movement data.

::: {.link-list}
[GitHub](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/evalue-HMM){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[Documentation](https://aureliennicosiaulaval.github.io/evalue-HMM/){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6}
::: {.package-card .github-package-card}
<div class="package-card-header">
<span class="package-card-fallback">HS</span>
<div>
<h3>hsmmHmmApproximation</h3>
<div class="package-card-meta">R compendium • v0.0.0.9000</div>
</div>
</div>

<span class="package-card-tag">HSMM</span>

A research compendium for finite-horizon HMM approximations to hidden semi-Markov models.

::: {.link-list}
[GitHub](https://github.com/AurelienNicosiaULaval/hsmm-finite-horizon-code-data){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::
:::
:::

## External Open Source Contributions

These contributions are to packages maintained under other GitHub accounts or organizations.

::: { .grid .gap-4 }
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-lg-6}
::: {.package-card .github-package-card}
<div class="package-card-header">
<span class="package-card-fallback">AM</span>
<div>
<h3>amt</h3>
<div class="package-card-meta">R package • external contribution</div>
</div>
</div>

<span class="package-card-tag">Movement ecology</span>

Contribution to the R package `amt` through PR `#142`, “Add generative validation diagnostics”, merged on June 23, 2026 into `jmsigner/amt`.

::: {.link-list}
[amt package](https://github.com/jmsigner/amt){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
[PR #142](https://github.com/jmsigner/amt/pull/142){.btn .btn-outline-dark .rounded-pill .shadow-sm}
:::
:::
:::
:::
